title: Backrooms
description: This mod implements 5 custom dimensions based upon existing backrooms levels
body:
This mod, as featured on my channel, will add 5 new dimensions into minecraft
These dimensions loosely follow the backgrooms lore.
Be aware, this mod is not perfect and was made for entertainment purposes, and will likely not be updated often.
Levels:
- Level 0
- Level 2 (+1 on the same dimension)
- Level 7
- Level 11
- Level 10
Entities:
- Bacteria
- Smiler
- Hound
- Skinstealer
- Weeper (custom entity)
- The Thing
- Death Moth
  
Again, this was made for fun and entertainment, so the mod has several issues in terms of structure generation. I have done my best to incorporate work arounds where possible. Also make sure to watch my video on it for more information.
